events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a field-service visit where manifold operations are being performed. The observed condition is "venting trapped pressure to face level (HAZ)" - this is a safety hazard. The work is in-progress.

This is a sequence/safety violation. Venting trapped pressure to face level is dangerous. Before work can continue, pressure must be safely relieved/blocked, and proper PPE and procedures must be followed.

Decision: fail (dangerous/non-compliant)
Risk: critical
Work stage: in-progress
Component conditions: installed-defective (the manifold may have trapped pressure issue)
Percent complete: estimate maybe 20-30%
Findings: venting trapped pressure to face level is a hazard
Actions: stop work, isolate/block pressure, use proper venting away from face, verify zero energy state
Rationale: venting trapped pressure at face level violates safe work practices; must isolate and relieve pressure safely before continuing
References: mfr procedures

Let me write the JSON.
